notes: Committed snapshot referenced by README.md's Evaluation section. Regenerate with `npm run eval` (deterministic, offline, ~1s).
This dataset was written and committed before any retrieval tuning against it — see README's honesty note about small-eval-set optimism bias.

keyword mode edges out bm25 on hit@6 (95.8% vs 91.7%) despite losing on hit@4 and MRR — a real result from this dataset, kept rather than hidden. hybrid wins outright on hit@4 and MRR, and ties for best on hit@6.

An --llm run (numeric grounding + citation verification) was attempted the same day but hit OpenRouter's free-tier daily rate limit (50 req/day) partway through; those non-deterministic LLM-quality numbers are not included in this baseline. See README's Known Limitations for the free-model trade-off.
